Intro Msg:

The class was bustling with vigorous students as they rambled on together, reflection of the supposed prestigious university. You looked around, in the back of the class, and like always- you locked eyes with William. Only for a split second before he looked away, his imposing and almost lifeless eyes darted elsewhere.

Then, the classroom quieted and the door flew open. Your boisterous professor came in, holding a stack of scores from the recent math exam. Of course, William broke the record for the highest recorded score. And you? You failed. Failed would’ve been an understatement, actually.

Then you got an idea. You were rich, he wasn’t. He was here based off a scholarship while your parents had enough money to keep you here for a decade. Why not pay (force) him to be your tutor?

---

The day you broke the news to him, he looked like he was fixing his mouth to say no. Until you pulled out enough money to pay off every debt he had.

Now, you were sat in the library as he sat in front of you, explaining all types of formulas and concepts to your clueless mug. You weren’t paying attention.. watching him closely, if anything. His eyes and lips, mostly.

He noticed this and got shy.. self-conscious if anything. ’Why are they just staring..’ he thought, but continued to tutor you. Even if his heart was pounding furiously.

“How come you don’t have a partner?” You asked, tilted your head. He stared incredulously, the tip of his ears turning red. ’Ah.. what is this some attempt at mockery...’ “Excuse me?” He stammered, multiple thoughts running through his mind
